title: Jeff Bezos Quietly Builds a Multibillion-Dollar AI War Chest Through His Secretive Lab, Bezos Expeditions
description: Jeff Bezos's personal investment arm, Bezos Expeditions, is raising a multibillion-dollar AI-focused investment vehicle, expanding his already substantial portfolio that includes stakes in Anthropic, Perplexity AI, and Figure AI, signaling a major escalation in the billionaire's artificial intelligence ambitions.

title: Boy George is writing new songs with AI and told haters 'I'm ahead of you'
description: Karma Chameleon singer Boy George said he thinks he is getting ‘ahead’ by using ChatGPT to come up with lyrics and he's tired of writing tunes the old fashioned way

title: Gurgaon restaurant uses robot to serve food on tables, internet fumes, ‘AI again’ | Watch viral video
description: Viral video: A robot in Gurgaon's restaurant comes to serve food. Watch viral video.

title: Paradigm Seeks $1.5B For New Fund Focused On AI, Robotics
description: Paradigm is seeking to secure $1.5 billion for its new investment fund. According to a report by the Wall Street Journal, the cryptocurrency-focused fund will primarily target opportunities in artificial intelligence (AI) and robotics.The firm plans to leverage its current technical investment team to identify and pursue opportunities in frontier technologies, instead of creating a dedicated new division.Paradigm is not a stranger to the AI sector.Last month, the firm collaborated with OpenAi to launch EVMbench, a ...Full story available on Benzinga.com

title: We Got Him: The Troll Corrupting Soulseek With ‘Potentially Infinite’ AI Homer Simpson Songs Slams His Haters
description: An online troll who uploaded a huge stash of Homer Simpson songs onto music-sharing platform Soulseek has promised that even more AI cover versions are on their way—adding that it will soon be more difficult than ever to avoid them. The internet prankster, known only as “Mr. Daniels,” laughed off criticism that he’s ruined “web [...]The post We Got Him: The Troll Corrupting Soulseek With ‘Potentially Infinite’ AI Homer Simpson Songs Slams His Haters appeared first on VICE.
